title: iPSC-Derived Cardiomyocyte for QT Prolongation (CiPA Precedent)
source: synthetic (inspired by FDA CiPA initiative — iPSC-CM accepted for proarrhythmia risk assessment)

validation_evidence.reference: Blinova et al. 2018 - CiPA Phase II multi-site iPSC-CM validation
Fermini et al. 2016 - iPSC-CM proarrhythmia sensitivity across 28 drugs
CiPA Phase III 2022 - Multi-center blinded validation of iPSC-CM for QT risk

regulatory_precedent: FDA CiPA initiative accepted iPSC-CM for proarrhythmia risk assessment (2018)
ICH E14/S7B Q&A endorsed in silico + iPSC-CM integrated approach (2022)
FDA accepted CiPA data as supportive evidence in multiple NDA submissions (2020-2024)
